summary: Tutorial module for new Seekers. Warden Voss briefs the party, they select loadouts at the Armory, and descend into a five-room cellar beneath the old storehouse to clear a Tier I Rot incursion. The source is a Hollowed Bear -- a cave bear consumed by the Blight during hibernation. Teaches combat, investigation, hazard saves, Doom Clock management, and boss mechanics.
teaching_sequence: Room 0 (Ash Stairs): Movement, perception checks, Doom Clock introduction
Room 1 (Spoiled Stores): Basic combat vs 2 Rot-Beetles, Skitter ability
Room 2 (Sealed Alcove): Search, lockpick (puzzle-latch), trapped chest
Room 3 (Cracked Vein): Hazard saves (rubble + spores), compound consequences, Doom Clock non-combat advance
Room 4 (Hollow Den): Boss fight -- grapple saves, fire vulnerability, fungal anchor mechanic, resource management
